messages.content:
I am in co working space filed.
I want to set up a seminar.
Give me some topic please

1. The future of co-working spaces and their impact on businesses
2. How to enhance productivity in a co-working environment
3. Building community in co-working spaces for better collaboration and networking
4. Navigating the legal and regulatory issues in co-working spaces 
5. Maximizing the value of co-working spaces for startups and entrepreneurs 
6. Designing a co-working space that meets the needs and preferences of modern workers 
7. The role of technology in co-working and shared office spaces 
8. The benefits of incorporating wellness and mindfulness practices in co-working spaces 
9. Strategies for managing and reducing co-working space costs 
10. Co-working and the gig economy: opportunities and challenges for freelancers and independent contractors.
I added customer whatsapp. what should i say to him?

When a customer reaches out to you on WhatsApp, you can start by greeting them and thanking them for contacting your business. Here's an example:

"Hello! Thank you for contacting [Your Company Name] on WhatsApp. How can I assist you today?"

Next, you can ask them how you can help or if they have any specific questions or concerns. For instance:

"Is there anything I can assist you with? Do you have any questions regarding our products/services?"

Once the customer lets you know how you can assist them, try to respond in a clear and friendly manner. Make sure to provide any necessary information or links that could help them to resolve their query or concern.

Finally, end the conversation by thanking the customer for reaching out and let them know that you're available to assist them in the future. For example:

"Thanks again for contacting us. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any further questions or concerns. Have a great day!"
i contacted customers

That's great! It's always important to make sure your customers feel valued and heard. Did you have any specific questions or concerns that you helped your customers with on WhatsApp? If so, I'd be happy to help you with any follow-up steps you may need to take.
yes please

Sure, I'm happy to help. What specific questions or concerns did your customers have on WhatsApp, and what assistance did you provide them with? Depending on the nature and details of the query, I can provide specific follow-up steps that you may need to take in order to ensure your customer's satisfaction.
i want to ask i sent emai o him earlier, does he need any other information

Great question! You can ask your customer if they received the email that you sent to them earlier and if they need any additional information or clarification. Here's an example message:

"Hi there! I just wanted to check if you received the email I sent earlier. Is there any other information that you need or any questions that you have? I'm happy to assist you further."

By doing this, you are showing your customer that you are following up proactively and ensuring that they have all the information they need to make an informed decision. Additionally, you are providing them with an opportunity to ask any additional questions that they may have, which can help to alleviate any concerns that they may have.

What should i reply to this " I am available at <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER> (Whatsapp)
Would like to understand options as the attached offer is beyond our Budget"

Here's an example reply that you can send to your customer:

"Thank you for reaching out to us. I can definitely understand your budget concerns. We have a range of options that may better meet your needs and budget. Could you please share some more information regarding your requirements, such as your preferred location, workspace size, and desired amenities? This will allow me to fully understand your needs and provide you with some viable options. Also, I have saved your WhatsApp number and will reach out to you within the next few hours. Thank you!"

help me write email.
I understand from Khun Gift that your friend is looking for a 4 pax private office. Thank you for suggest our services to your friend.I am very happy to propose you some of the available office.

Sure, here's an example email that you can use:

Subject: Available 4 pax private office options

Dear [Name],

I hope this email finds you well. Khun Gift got in touch with me and informed me that you are currently searching for a 4 pax private office. I'd like to thank you for considering our services, and we would be more than happy to propose some available options for you to choose from.

We have several 4 pax private offices available across our locations, each featuring modern furnishings, high-speed internet connection, and access to premium amenities. We can offer flexible lease terms depending on your requirements and budget.

I would be delighted to discuss the specific requirements of your private office with you in more detail. Please let me know if there are any particular neighborhoods or districts you are interested in, as well as any other requested amenities or workplace features.

The next steps to advance the process will be to schedule a viewing of the property. Our team of experts are able to help you with this process, or you can contact us directly at our location for more information.

Thank you again for considering our services, and we look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
his friend is looking for an office not him he just suggest our property to his friend

Thank you for the clarification. Here's an updated version of the email that you can use:

Subject: Available 4 pax private office options

Dear [Name],

I hope this email finds you well. Thank you for suggesting our services to your friend who is currently searching for a 4 pax private office. We would be more than happy to propose some available options for your friend to choose from.

We have several 4 pax private offices available across our locations, each featuring modern furnishings, high-speed internet connection, and access to premium amenities. We can offer flexible lease terms depending on your friend's requirements and budget.

I would be delighted to discuss the specific requirements of your friend's private office with you in more detail. Please let me know if there are any particular neighborhoods or districts your friend is interested in, as well as any other requested amenities or workplace features.

The next steps to advance the process will be to schedule a viewing of the property. Our team of experts are able to help you or your friend with this process, or you can contact us directly at our location for more information.

Thank you again for suggesting our services, and we look forward to hearing from your friend.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
what should i react to how are you doing?

If someone asks you "How are you doing?", it's important to show that you are polite and professional. Here's an example response you could use:

"Thank you for asking, I'm doing well. How can I assist you today?" 

This type of response not only answers their question but it also quickly pivots the conversation towards the business you are conducting. It shows that you are attentive and focused on helping them with their needs.

make this formal please
Unfortunately, we don't have 6 pax room with that budget.
We have 4 pax private office , no view 11sqm. 28,750THB, the maximum discount we can offer is 22,000THB/month
for 12 month contract. This room is for 4 pax, if you don't have many staff, i think it can fit 1 or 2 more tables.
Or I have another option , if you are not having 6 people in the office at all time, 
You can rent a small room private office and for extra staff they can work at the co working space at the rate of 200THB/day. 
(special offer for inhouse clients normal 300THB/day)

Here's a formal email response you can use:

Dear [Name],

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding the 6 pax room requirement. We regret to inform you that we do not currently have any 6 pax private offices that fit your budget.

However, we do have a 4 pax private office available with no view, which spans over 11sqm and is priced at 28,750 THB per month. The maximum discount we can offer for a 12 month contract is 22,000 THB/month. This room can accommodate up to 4 people, but if you do not have many staff, it may be possible to include 1 or 2 additional tables.

Alternatively, we have another option for you. If all your staff will not be based in the office all the time, you could rent a small room private office for your core team and for additional staff, they could work at the co-working space at a rate of 200 THB per day. (Normally 300 THB per day, but we can offer a special rate for our in-house clients). 

Please let us know which option best suits your requirements and feel free to get back to us if there are any queries that we can help you with.

Thank you for considering our services and we look forward to hearing back from you.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]

Help me write an email in english using the following details
เฟิร์นติดต่อจาก Shinei Serviced Office & Co working space ค่ะ
ขอบคุณที่ให้ความสนใจติดต่อสอบถามบริการของเรานะคะ จากข้อมูลที่ทางเราได้รับขออนุญาตส่งรายละเอียดแพ็คเกจ Virtual office ให้พิจารณาค่ะ
สำหรับบริษัทจดใหม่เลยทางเราขอแนะนำเป็นแพ็คเกจ Pro ค่ะ เนื่องจากแพ็คเกจ Pro จะมีที่นั่ง Fixed desk แสดงให้กับเจ้าหน้าที่สรรพากรดูหากมีการเข้าตรวจค่ะ
ซึ่งส่วนใหญ่เจ้าหน้าที่มักจะเข้าตรวจสำหรับบริษัทจดใหม่ค่ะ

Here's an email that you can use:

Subject: Shinei Serviced Office & Co-working Space - Virtual Office Packages

Dear [Name],

Thank you for contacting Shinei Serviced Office & Co-working Space and showing interest in our services. We appreciate your inquiry regarding our virtual office packages, and we would like to provide you with more information.

Based on the information provided, we suggest our Pro package as it includes a fixed desk for your staff. This would be useful if there are any upcoming audits by the revenue department, as this package would provide a designated workstation for your team. 

Typically, this package is suitable for newly established companies looking for a professional workspace solution without long-term commitments. Please be informed that we provide you with a range of additional services, such as mail forwarding, call answering and secretarial support to keep your business running smoothly.

Please let us know if you have any further questions or if you would like to schedule a visit to our premises. We would be more than happy to help you find the right solution for your business needs.

Thank you again for your interest in Shinei Serviced Office & Co-working Space.

Best Regards,

[Your Name]
